title: Destination Lifestyle & Content Photography
intro: Some stories deserve more than a few posed photographs.
body: Shaney can travel with couples, families, creators or destination wedding parties to document the full experience naturally, from the quiet in-between moments to the details, portraits, lifestyle content and main occasion. This service is ideal for destination weddings, influencer trips, family holidays, brand stories, milestone celebrations and clients who want beautiful, natural content without having to rely on phone photos or rushed moments.
valueCopy: Choosing the right photographer is about more than location. It is about trust, style, connection and knowing your story will be documented with care. Although Shaney is based in South Africa, her work is created for clients who value natural emotion, beautiful light and a calm, professional experience. For international clients paying in dollars, euros or pounds, the South African rand can also create a meaningful value advantage compared with photography rates in many international markets. This means clients can invest in heartfelt, high-quality photography while still receiving a personal, carefully planned experience from enquiry to final gallery. For destination weddings, family trips, influencer content, brand stories or once-in-a-lifetime occasions, Shaney can document the full experience with warmth, detail and intention.
styledMomentsCopy: For destination clients, creators and lifestyle brands, Shaney can capture the real moments as they unfold while also helping plan styled content opportunities that feel natural, beautiful and aligned with the story of the trip.
